channel.title: 2026-02-06 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-02-06 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Inducing Ferroquadrupolar Order with Applied Magnetic Field in TbPO₄
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Paola Caterina Forino, Jens Jensen, Jian Rui Soh, Sonia Francoual, Oksana Zaharko, Steffen Sloth, Alexandra Turrini, Ralf Feyerherm, Karel Prokes, Sofie Holm-Janas, Ivica Zivkovic, Yong Liu, Arnaud Magrez, Niels Bech Christensen, Henrik M. Rønnow, and Rasmus Toft-Petersen
Author(s): Paola Caterina Forino, Jens Jensen, Jian Rui Soh, Sonia Francoual, Oksana Zaharko, Steffen Sloth, Alexandra Turrini, Ralf Feyerherm, Karel Prokes, Sofie Holm-Janas, Ivica Zivkovic, Yong Liu, Arnaud Magrez, Niels Bech Christensen, Henrik M. Rønnow, and Rasmus Toft-Petersen Magnetic fields are demonstrated to be able to be used to switch hidden electronic orders on and off in rare-earth magnets, uncovering a mechanism where field application induces rather than suppresses these elusive states [Phys. Rev. X 16, 011021] Published Fri Feb 06, 2026
